body.title: /day-close-audit skill drift — Step 8 fn name + Step 9 schema + Step 12 table qualification
body.result: All 3 drift fixes shipped to ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/SKILL.md: (1) Step 8 _tool_balance_trajectory→get_balance_trajectory (renamed import); (2) Step 9 schema query now covers clan/instance/public schemas with required={clan.memories, clan.interpretive_edges, instance.ring_memory, instance.twm_observations}; (3) Step 12 FROM memories→FROM clan.memories. Smoke-tested all 3 against live DB: Step 8 returns dict, Step 9 missing=set(), Step 12 returns 132 PROCEDURAL habits. Skills are user-local, not git-tracked.
body.description:
/day-close-audit skill has three drift findings caught during 2026-04-30 day-close run:

1. Step 8 (OR burn rate) — calls `_tool_balance_trajectory` which was renamed to `get_balance_trajectory` in budget.py. Currently throws ImportError.
2. Step 9 (DB schema spot-check) — looks for tables in `public` schema, but post-D-sqlite-removal-2026-04-22 the canonical home is `clan.*` (memories, interpretive_edges) and `instance.*` (ring_memory, twm_observations). Currently reports MISSING tables.
3. Step 12 (Habit health) — references unqualified `memories` table; should be `clan.memories` for Postgres canonical schema. (Already fixed inline during this run; needs to land in the skill.)

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/day-close-audit/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** none apply (skill update, not code)
**Scope boundary:** in scope = three labeled fixes above; out of scope = broader skill rewrite
**Test plan:** no tests because: skill markdown — verified by next /day-close-audit run executing cleanly
